arguments.content:
# Next Week Preview: April 13–17, 2026

**Week:** Sprint 9 Week 2  
**Focus:** Deployment Readiness & Performance Optimization  
**Sprint Goal:** Complete production deployment and achieve P99 < 200ms

---

## 🎯 Expected Work Focus

### Primary Objectives
1. **Complete Production Deployment**
   - Finalize remaining deployment checklist items
   - Execute production rollout with monitoring
   - Validate rollback procedures

2. **Performance Optimization**
   - Reduce P99 response time from 215ms to < 200ms
   - Optimize database query patterns
   - Implement caching layer improvements

3. **Security & Compliance**
   - Complete pending security scan
   - Document security findings and remediation
   - Update compliance documentation

### Secondary Objectives
- Remove deprecated database tables (post-migration cleanup)
- Expand new dashboard features based on user feedback
- Plan Sprint 10 scope and goals

---

## 📁 Files Likely to Be Modified

> ⚠️ **Reminder:** All modifications to existing files require creating `.bak` backups first (P4 rule).

### High Probability Modifications

| File | Directory | Expected Changes | Backup Required |
|------|-----------|------------------|-----------------|
| `deploy_checklist.md` | `day20/` | Mark remaining items complete (3, 6) | ✅ Yes |
| `api_benchmark.json` | `day20/` | Add new performance metrics | ✅ Yes |
| `app_config.json` | `day20/` | Additional feature flags or config changes | ✅ Yes |
| `weekly_status.json` | `day20/` | Update progress and metrics | ✅ Yes |
| `ci_config.yaml` | `day20/` | Potential CI/CD adjustments | ✅ Yes |

### Medium Probability Modifications

| File | Directory | Expected Changes | Backup Required |
|------|-----------|------------------|-----------------|
| `README.md` | `day20/` | Documentation updates | ✅ Yes |
| Security scan results | TBD | Add security report files | N/A (new files) |
| Rollback plan docs | TBD | Create/update documentation | N/A (new files) |

### New Files Expected (No Backup Required)

| File Type | Naming Convention | Purpose |
|-----------|-------------------|---------|
| Daily reports | `20260413_*.md` | Daily progress tracking |
| Security reports | `20260413_*.json` | Security scan results |
| Performance analysis | `20260413_*.json` | Optimization findings |
| Sprint retrospective | `20260417_*.md` | End-of-week review |

---

## 🏆 Next Week's OKRs

### Objective 1: Successful Production Deployment
**Key Results:**
- [ ] KR1.1: 100% of deployment checklist items completed
- [ ] KR1.2: Zero-downtime production deployment executed
- [ ] KR1.3: Rollback plan tested and documented

### Objective 2: Performance Targets Achieved
**Key Results:**
- [ ] KR2.1: P99 response time ≤ 200ms (currently 215ms)
- [ ] KR2.2: API error rate < 0.1%
- [ ] KR2.3: Database query optimization completed

### Objective 3: Security & Compliance
**Key Results:**
- [ ] KR3.1: Security scan completed with all critical issues resolved
- [ ] KR3.2: Compliance documentation updated
- [ ] KR3.3: Security audit findings documented

### Objective 4: Technical Debt Reduction
**Key Results:**
- [ ] KR4.1: Deprecated database tables removed
- [ ] KR4.2: Legacy code cleanup completed
- [ ] KR4.3: Documentation updated for all changes

---

## 📅 Daily Schedule Preview

| Day | Focus Area | Key Activities |
|-----|------------|----------------|
| **Mon 4/13** | Security | Complete security scan, address findings |
| **Tue 4/14** | Performance | Database optimization, query tuning |
| **Wed 4/15** | Deployment Prep | Finalize checklist, test rollback plan |
| **Thu 4/16** | Production Deploy | Execute deployment, monitor metrics |
| **Fri 4/17** | Validation & Planning | Validate OKRs, plan Sprint 10 |

---

## ⚠️ Important Reminders

### P4 Backup Rule
> **Before modifying ANY existing file:**
> 1. Create backup: `cp file.ext file.ext.bak`
> 2. Then make your changes
> 3. Verify backup exists before proceeding

### P2 Naming Convention
> **New files must follow:** `YYYYMMDD_filename.ext`
> - Example: `20260413_security_scan_results.json`

### P1 Content Constraints
> **Agent-generated output must NOT contain:**
> - Future dates beyond generation time
> - Inconsistent timestamps
> - Impossible future data

---

## 🔗 Related Documents

- [Deploy Checklist](./deploy_checklist.md)
- [Weekly Status](./weekly_status.json)
- [Sprint Review Presentation](./20260410_sprint_review_presentation.md)
- [Backup Operations Summary](./20260410_backup_operations_summary.json)

---

**Prepared by:** Backend Team  
**Date:** April 10, 2026  
**Next Update:** April 13, 2026
